text:
A Holding may only be targeted by one Mark of Heaven's Favor per game.
Air Open, :bow:: Permanently increase a positive numeral on a target Holding by one (2 is a numeral, two is not). Remove this Spell from the game.
title: Mark of Heaven's Favor

flavor: "I never got many chances to commune with the water spirits in the Dragon mountains," the Tamori said, smiling. "But I should probably let this man go on his way."
designernotes: Art: An Isawa shugenja on a river bank, aiding the movement of boats with his water magic as they pass.

text: Water Battle, :bow:: Target your Personality, and another of your Personalities at a different location. Switch their locations. Straighten their units as they move.
title: Pull of the Tides

flavor: To see beyond what is, what might be, and what was: the curse and gift of those who can commune with the endless Void.
designernotes: A shugenja sees the taint inside of someone.

text:
You may Equip this Spell from your discard pile to a Void or Magistrate Shugenja.
Open, :bow:: Target a Personality. You suspect him of the taint. He has Shadowlands while you are taking actions (this turn).
title: See The Many Faces

flavor: "If you are just and the fire of the hero burns in your heart, the great Thunder Dragon will usher you forward and through any foe."

text:
Attaches to a Thunder Shugenja for 1 less Gold.
Thunder Open, :bow:: Give this Shugenja +2F and Conqueror.
title: Thunder Dragon's Child

flavor: Some think the devastation of lightning is the streak of fire from the sky. Those who survive and endure the crack of thunder against their body know better.
designernotes: A Shugenja calling on the thunder to dispatch his enemies.

text: Thunder Battle, :bow:: Ranged 3 Attack. Bow the target if it is still in play and this Shugenja is Thunder. Destroy this Spell.
notes: This card was misprinted with the card number 256
title: Thunderer's Embrace

flavor: To seek the blessings of Osano-wo is to seek death itself.
designernotes: Double lightning strike.

text:
This Personality loses and cannot gain Naval.
Thunder Battle, :bow:: Ranged 2 Attack. If this Shugenja is Thunder, you may bow this Shugenja and destroy this Spell to make a second consecutive Ranged 2 Attack. These Ranged Attacks cannot be combined (with any Ranged Attacks).
title: Fangs of the Heavens

flavor: "Dead leaves nourish the seedlings. It is the way of the world." - Tamori Mabasu
designernotes: An Earth Shugenja that is getting stronger every time an enemy falls.

text:
This Shugenja has Conqueror while he is Earth.
After your action resolves, if it bowed an enemy card, give this Shugenja +1F.
title: Nourished by Fallen Leaves

flavor: Spells are scrolls containing incantations. They are prayers, sacred utterances meant to invoke the kami who aid the caster. Memorizing these complex prayers is difficult and tedious. Of course, there are also spells to help with that.

text: Battle, :bow:: Take two additional actions to cast Spells. You cannot target other players or their cards this battle until after their next opportunity to take a Battle action.
title: Numinous Mantra

flavor: "All of the elements are equally balanced in a ranging storm. But balance does not always mean peace." - Moshi Madohime
designernotes: Art - Moshi Madohime standing atop the Torii arch in her Ivory art, using her fans to guide the raging storm around her.

text: Thunder Engage, :bow:: A great storm surrounds your army. Give your target Personality +1F. The next time the enemy leader targets one of your cards in this battle with a Battle action, they must target that Personality, if legal.
title: On Storm-Borne Wings

flavor: "I must find the answer. Only... only I dare not ask the question."
designernotes: [Note: A Phoenix Shugenja is scouring a library and/or a scroll looking for answers to a question he dares not ask. Think Gandalf.]

text: Open, :bow:: Show the top three cards of your Fate deck. Another player chooses and discards one. Put one of the two remaining cards in your hand and discard the other. Destroy this Spell.
title: Seeking Answers

flavor:
"Wasn't there one more? A woman, I think."
"No. We searched the temple. There was no one else."
designernotes: A Shugenja using his bond with the air kami to mask his presence.

text:
This Personality cannot be targeted. His abilities, and the abilities on his other attachments, cannot be used. Cards in this unit do not contribute Force during battle resolution unless they are Air.
Air Battle/Open: Destroy this Spell.
title: Stepping Behind The Tapestry

flavor: Enomoto's Prophecy, like many before, heralded things that none wished to consider. However, as it became better understood, many found they could not tear their thoughts away.
designernotes: Enomoto receives the Prophecy, goes insane, writes down what he sees, and dies.

text:
While this Shugenja is Void, he has Expendable.
Void Battle/Open, :bow:: Raise this Shugenja's Force to equal his Chi.
title: Terrible Revelations

flavor: "Water flows through any gap, no matter how slight or small." - Iuchi Wattu
designernotes: A water shugenja steps into a gush of water in one location to emerge from another gush of water elsewhere.

text:
This action has Absent while this Shugenja is Water.
Water Home Battle: Move this Personality home or to a battlefield where he would be opposed.
title: The Spaces In-Between

flavor: No matter how he ran, the boulder turned in tandem. Every glance, it was closer. His heart raced as the Kuni laughed in the distance. "This is how you crush a spider!"
designernotes: Art: A Kuni shugenja controlling a boulder through magic, rolling it towards a group of goblins.

text: Earth Battle, :bow:: Melee 1 Attack, plus 1 if this Shugenja is Earth, plus 1 if the current Province's strength has been increased or reduced this turn (Destroy a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with Force equal to or lower than the Melee Attack's strength).
title: Tracing with the Mountain's Finger

flavor: "All of that dedication, years of dojo training, the lessons of their sensei... and still they trust their eyes. Now to figure out why he was here..."
designernotes: A Phoenix Shugenja casting an image of himself to fool an attacker.

text:
Destroy this Spell after it straightens unless this Shugenja is Air.
Air Open, :bow:: Create a 0F/3C/0PH Air • Illusion • Nonhuman • Shugenja Personality. This Spell may remain bowed. Remove the Illusion from the game after the next time this Spell straightens or leaves play.
title: Trick of Moon's Light

flavor: "There is no place more peaceful than the center of a typhoon." - The Book of Water
designernotes: A Water Shugenja protected by a torrent of water.

text: Water Interrupt, :bow:: If this Shugenja is unbowed and is targeted by the Battle action, bow him, negate the action, and you may move him home if he is Water.
title: Veil of Water

flavor: "Of all the elemental kami, it is those of flame who are most eager to take shape in the world. Only the smallest of offerings... a candle's flame, a slight spark... and they manifest in full force, albeit briefly." - Isawa Koiso
designernotes: A fire shugenja summoning fire kami that swirl around him.

text: Fire Battle, :bow:: Give a target opposed Personality either +1F or -1F for each card in his unit, up to 3.
title: Warning Flame

flavor: Scorpion shugenja are known for versatility and deception, not sheer power. The Scorpion prefer it this way.
designernotes: A formation of troops being blown off of a hill by a sun-shaped explosion cast by a fire shugenja a distance away.

text: Fire Battle, :bow:: You may target your Samurai. Ranged Attack equal to this Shugenja's Chi or the Samurai's Chi, +2 if this Shugenja is Fire (Destroy a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with Force equal to or lower than the Ranged Attack's strength).
title: Calling on the Sun

flavor: "This shrine is sacred ground, my friend," she whispered. "You will not attack."
designernotes: A Personality being convinced magically to not attack a beautiful shrine by an Asahina.

text:
(Repeatable Interrupt: Discard an Honor card to give an Honor gain or loss +1 or -1.)
Air Open, :bow:: Bow this Shugenja to give a target Personality a Force penalty equal to this Shugenja's Chi. Gain 1 Honor if this Shugenja is Air.
title: Compassion's Invocation

flavor: Renyu waved his hand and a massive wall erupted from the living rock. "This will buy time," he promised. "But not forever."
designernotes: [Art Note: Forces try to push a Shugenja away and they root themselves into the ground with Earth magic.]

text:
Earth Interrupt, :bow:: If the action is another player's, negate this caster's movement from it.
Earth Battle, :bow:: If this Shugenja is Earth and opposed, give him +1F for each Earth card in this unit.
title: Earth's Inevitability

flavor: The mountains rumbled, their promise of thunder greater than any storm.
designernotes: Art: A Tamori Shugenja using a wall of rocks to divert a landslide away from a caravan.

text:
(Repeatable Interrupt: Discard an Honor card to give an Honor gain or loss +1 or -1.)
Earth Battle, :bow:: Raise or lower the current Province's strength by the number of Earth Followers or Spells (your choice) in this unit, plus 2 if this Shugenja is Earth and opposed.
title: Eternally Unyielding

flavor: "A gift for you, Spider. Your final gift in this world."
designernotes: A Shugenja using water as a projectile to hurt his enemies.

text:
(Draw a card after your Expendable card is destroyed. Once per game per card, a Resilient card does not die in battle resolution.)
This Shugenja has Resilient while they are Water.
Water Battle, :bow:: Fear 3.
title: Inazuma's Caress

flavor: The fall of the First Seal caused a surge of massive beasts from the Sea of Shadows. All at once, the Mantis were placed on the defensive.
designernotes: Art: Moshi Karuiko (20F Soul of Moshi Kamiya) standing on the prow of her ship, directing lightning towards an advancing sea monster. She is doing her best, but the monster is too massive and bloodthirsty to care.

text: Thunder Battle, :bow:: Fear 4 that may, if this caster is Thunder, target a Personality with Followers (Bow a target enemy Follower or Personality without Followers with 4 or lower Force).
title: Primal Tempest

flavor:
"Your names are weak, mewling things.
I require all three of you to summon but a single oni of note."
designernotes: [Art Note: A Chuda, sacrificing a victim on an alter, preferably someone of a Clan who is not willing. Or perhaps instead of a Chuda, this can be the Oni Summoner Sensei (at the end of the PDF).]

text: Maho Repeatable Open, :g*:: Bow this Shugenja and destroy your target Human Personality to search your Dynasty discard pile, then deck, for an Oni Personality and Recruit it. Lose 3 Honor. (Repeatable actions may be taken any number of times per turn.)
title: Ritual of Naming

flavor: "Nature's pattern is imperfect, yet flawless. Encouraging repetition in the pattern can be useful, or endlessly confusing."
designernotes: Notes: A void shugenja who is multiplying in numbers.

text: Void Battle/Engage, :bow:: Give your target Personality +3F. If this Shugenja is Void, abilities on the target may be used a second time this turn.
title: The Tapestry's Flowing Pattern

flavor: The whispers of the air kami can enhance even the most scholarly mind.
designernotes: An Air Shugenja at a table, reading from a number of scrolls.

text:
You may Equip this Spell from your discard pile, bowed, to an Air Shugenja if you control a Library or Temple Holding.
Air Open, :bow:: Bow this Shugenja to gain 1 Honor. Destroy this Spell.
title: The Wind's Clarity

flavor: The lanterns in the room flickered as the shugenja's prayer was completed. "You will have all you need to complete your final task," the priest said sadly.
designernotes: Notes: A Shugenja enchanting other Shugenja to attack.

text: Open, :bow:: Give your target Personality Expendable. (Draw a card after your Expendable card dies.)
title: The World's Essence

flavor: The Spider charged. The Mantis and the Phoenix struggled to do their part, fighting alongside the Crab with great fervor.
designernotes: Thunder striking, and people suffering from its loud noise.

text:
(Repeatable Interrupt: Discard a Courage card to give a Fear effect +2 or -2 strength.)
Thunder Battle, :bow:: Ranged 2 Attack. Then, if this Shugenja is Thunder, Fear 2. Neither of these effects may be combined.
title: Thunder's Resplendent Gift

flavor: At the priest's command, the river leapt to life and struck down his enemies. The Fortune of the Sea's reach was significant, well beyond the coastal waters.
designernotes: Isawa Uzuyumi elegantly directs a surge of water from a river with her tessen to blast a charging samurai and his men into the air.

text:
This action has Home while this Shugenja is Water. (Home actions may be taken from home.)
Water Battle, :bow:: Move a target Personality to an adjacent, unresolved battlefield.
title: Wrath of Suitengu
